'''Weutta''' was the Head of Security on [[Phindar/Legends|Phindar]] approximately [[42 BBY/Legends|42 BBY]]. He was responsible for dealing with rebels against [[Baftu]] and [[Terra Derida]]'s rule of Phindar and after a state of emergency was declared on the planet he brought all rebels before Baftu.

Weutta interrogated [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] after he was arrested for impersonating a guard, not knowing the thirteen-year-old was a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]]. He used a [[Force pike/Legends|Force-pike]] on Obi-Wan and tried to extract information from him about other rebels on the planet. Obi-Wan didn't answer and Weutta brought him before Baftu. Weutta was rather pudgy and rough with his prisoners, but was quite nervous around Baftu.

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Hidden Past]]'' {{1st}}
